---
title: "MGR820"
description: "Notes and materials for MGR820."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "order"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, reading-time]
---

Every page in this folder appears below automatically, in `order`. To add a
new one, create a new `.qmd` file in this folder with a title, description,
date, order, and difficulty in the front matter. It will show up here the
next time the site is rendered.
